global.patient_position_directions: Da fatan za a zaɓi wurin mara lafiya da kuke so don yin wannan gwajin {bodyPartName} . Da zarar an zaɓi wurin, zaɓi maɓallin "NEXT" don ci gaba.
global.patient_landmarking_directions: Yin amfani da maɓallan laser da kewayawa, da fatan za a matsar da majiyyaci da tebur zuwa matsayin da kuke son sanya su a ciki don ganowa a cikin wannan binciken {bodyPartName} kuma zaɓi "Tabbatar da Alamar Ƙasa". Da zarar an zaɓi alamar ƙasa, zaɓi maɓallin "NEXT" don ci gaba.
global.patient_position_is_incorrect: Matsayin majinyacin da kuka zaɓa ba daidai ba ne.  Da fatan za a yi zaɓinku na gaba daga yiwuwar matsayi na haƙuri da aka jera a ƙasa.

TermsAndConditions.terms_and_conditions_of_use_description: Wannan rukunin yanar gizon, www.scanlabmr.com, mallakar MediSim Technologies, LLC, wani Kamfanin Lamuni mai iyaka na Florida ("MST," "mu," "namu," da "mu"). A cikin waɗannan sharuɗɗan da sharuɗɗan amfani, kalmomin “kai” da “naka” suna nufin mai amfani da ke ziyartar rukunin yanar gizon. Waɗannan sharuɗɗan da sharuɗɗan amfani ("Sharuɗɗan Amfani") sun tsara sharuɗɗan ɗaure bisa doka don amfani da rukunin yanar gizon ku. Ta hanyar shiga ko amfani da wannan rukunin yanar gizon ta kowace hanya, kuna nuna yarjejeniyar ku zuwa: (i) waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani, (ii) Manufar Sirrin mu (“Manufar Keɓantawa”), da (iii) duk wani sanarwa na doka, yanayi ko jagororin da ke cikin rukunin yanar gizon. Waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani sun shafi gidan yanar gizon mu ko duk wani sabis na kan layi na MST ko aikace-aikacen da ke sanya hanyar haɗi zuwa waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani, da kowane fasali, widgits, plug-ins, abun ciki, zazzagewa ko wasu ayyukan da aka bayar, ko irin wannan sabis na kan layi na MST ko aikace-aikace (tare, "Shafin"). Waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani za su yi aiki ba tare da la’akari da yadda kake shiga ko amfani da rukunin yanar gizon ba, ko ta kwamfuta, kwamfutar hannu, na’urar hannu, agogo mai wayo, na’ura mai kwakwalwa, ko akasin haka. duk wani aikace-aikacen hannu da ke sanya hanyar haɗi zuwa wannan shafin. Idan baku yarda da ɗayan waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani ba ko Manufar Keɓantawa, don Allah kar a yi amfani da rukunin yanar gizon ku fita yanzu.
TermsAndConditions.important_legal_information_about_privac: Muhimman Bayanan Shari'a game da Keɓantawa

shafi amfani da rukunin yanar gizon ku, samar da wani muhimmin sashi na yarjejeniyar ku da mu, kuma an haɗa su ta hanyar tunani cikin waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani. Ya kamata ku karanta Dokar Sirri a hankali kafin ku yi amfani da rukunin yanar gizon mu tunda, ta amfani da rukunin yanar gizon, zaku yarda da komai a cikin waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani, gami da sharuɗɗan da ke ƙunshe a cikin Dokar Sirri.
TermsAndConditions.modification_to_these_terms: Canjawa zuwa Waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani da Shafin Mu
TermsAndConditions.modification_to_these_terms_description: Za mu iya ƙara zuwa, sabuntawa, sharewa daga ko gyara rukunin yanar gizon a kowane lokaci bisa ga ra'ayin mu kaɗai. Mun tanadi haƙƙi, a kowane lokaci kuma daga lokaci zuwa lokaci, ga kowane dalili, don canza Sharuɗɗan Amfani. Za mu iya buga ko nuna sanarwar canje-canje ga Sharuɗɗan Amfani akan rukunin yanar gizon ko ƙila mu sanar da ku irin waɗannan canje-canje. Da zarar an buga, waɗannan canje-canjen zuwa Sharuɗɗan Amfani suna yin tasiri nan da nan. Idan duk wani canji da muka yi bai yarda da ku ba, da sauri daina amfani da rukunin yanar gizon. Duk wani amfani da ku na rukunin yanar gizon bayan kowane canje-canje ga Sharuɗɗan Amfaninmu ya zama mai tasiri zai nuna alamar ku ga waɗannan canje-canje. Ya kamata ku sake dubawa akai-akai kuma ku sake duba waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani don ku san mafi yawan haƙƙoƙin da wajibai waɗanda suka shafi yarjejeniyarku da mu. Babu wani abu a cikin waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani da ke ba ku kowane haƙƙin ɓangare na uku ko fa'idodi.
TermsAndConditions.access_and_use: Shiga da Amfani da Yanar Gizo
TermsAndConditions.access_and_use_description: Waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Amfani sun shafi duk masu amfani da rukunin yanar gizon. Muna samar da Abubuwan da ke cikin rukunin yanar gizon (wanda aka bayyana a ƙasa) azaman ladabi ga masu amfani da mu kuma muna nufin shi don dalilai na gaba ɗaya, bayanai da dalilai na ilimi kawai. Dukkan bayanai daga wannan rukunin yanar gizon suna iya canzawa ba tare da sanarwa ba. Muna ba ku damar samun dama da amfani da Abubuwan da ke cikin rukunin yanar gizon don dalilai na sirri, waɗanda ba na kasuwanci ba kawai kuma ta haka muna ba ku izinin saukewa da buga Abubuwan da ke cikin rukunin yanar gizon don kawai dalilai na kallo, karantawa, da riƙe kayan don marasa kasuwanci, amfanin ilimi. Duk wani kwafi, rarrabawa, sakewa, ko gyara Abubuwan Yanar Gizo, ko ta hanyar lantarki ko wani nau'i, an haramta ba tare da takamaiman izinin rubutaccen bayaninmu ba. Kun yarda cewa ba za ku tarwatsa, tarwatsa, injiniyan baya ko in ba haka ba za ku canza Abubuwan da ke cikin rukunin yanar gizon, duk wani abu akan wannan rukunin yanar gizon ko software na rukunin yanar gizon. Duk wani amfani mara izini ko haramtacce na iya shigar da mai laifin ga alhaki na farar hula da kuma tuhumar laifuffuka a ƙarƙashin dokokin da suka dace.
TermsAndConditions.user_accounts_description1: Don amfani da wasu fasalulluka na rukunin yanar gizon kuna iya buƙatar ƙirƙirar sunan mai amfani da kalmar wucewa. Idan ana buƙatar wani fasalin rukunin yanar gizon, MST za ta samar muku da kalmar sirri sannan za a sa ku ƙirƙiri sunan mai amfani da kalmar wucewa. Kuna da alhakin duk wani hulɗa tare da rukunin yanar gizon da ke faruwa ta hanyar asusun ku, ko da kuwa ko irin wannan amfani ba shi da izini ko ta wani ɓangare na uku. Da fatan za a kiyaye sunan mai amfani da kalmar wucewa kuma kada ku bar wani ya yi amfani da bayanan asusun ku don shiga rukunin yanar gizon.
TermsAndConditions.user_accounts_description2: Mutum wanda ya sayi lasisin ko kuma wanda kamfani ya sanya wa lambar lasisi ɗaya kaɗai za a yi amfani da asusun mai amfani. Ba a ba da izinin raba lasisin ScanLab don amfani da yawa ba. Ba a yarda a yi amfani da lasisin ScanLab azaman hanyar gabatar da ilimi ko koyarwa ba tare da rubutaccen izinin ScanLab ba. Duk wani keta waɗannan sharuɗɗan zai haifar da matakin doka da dakatar da amfani da sabis nan take.

Kuki (ko "abun da aka raba a cikin gida") fayil ne na bayanai da aka sanya akan na'urarku lokacin da kuka ziyarci rukunin yanar gizon mu. Mai binciken ku, ko wata software (ciki har da Adobe Flash), na iya ba ku damar ƙin ko cire kukis, amma idan kun yi haka, wasu fasalulluka na rukunin yanar gizonmu ba za su yi aiki yadda ya kamata ba, kuma ƙila ba za mu iya tuna abubuwan da kuke so a gaba da kuka ziyarta ba. Hakanan muna iya amfani da rajistan ayyukan sabar gidan yanar gizo don tattarawa da adana bayanai game da amfani da rukunin yanar gizon. Mun kuma tanadi haƙƙin raba bayanan da muke tattarawa tare da rassanmu da abokan haɗin gwiwarmu da duk wani mai shi na gaba a yayin haɗuwa, haɓakawa, sayar da kadarorinmu, ko wasu canji a cikin kasuwancinmu.
